SEARCH
Module JDA.Autoregister
Package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands

Annotation Interface Option

@Retention(RUNTIME) @Target(ANNOTATION_TYPE) public @interface Option
Defines a command option (parameter) for a Slash Command.

Options are the inputs users provide when executing a command. They can range from simple strings to complex objects like users or roles.

  • Required Element Summary

    Required Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Required Element
    Description
    String
    description
    A short description of what this option does.
    String
    name
    The name of the option.
    net.dv8tion.jda.api.interactions.commands.OptionType
    optionType
    The type of the option (e.g., STRING, INTEGER, USER).

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    Choice[]
    choices
    A fixed set of choices the user can pick from.
    boolean
    required
    Whether the user is required to provide a value for this option.

  • Element Details

    • name

      String name
      The name of the option. Must be lowercase and follow Discord's naming requirements (1-32 characters).
      Returns:
      The option name.

    • description

      String description
      A short description of what this option does. Shown to the user in the Discord UI (1-100 characters).
      Returns:
      The option description.

    • optionType

      net.dv8tion.jda.api.interactions.commands.OptionType optionType
      The type of the option (e.g., STRING, INTEGER, USER).
      Returns:
      The OptionType.

    • choices

      Choice[] choices
      A fixed set of choices the user can pick from.

      Note: Discord only supports choices for the types OptionType.STRING, OptionType.INTEGER, and OptionType.NUMBER.

      Returns:
      An array of Choice annotations.
      Default:
      {}

    • required

      boolean required
      Whether the user is required to provide a value for this option. Defaults to true.
      Returns:
      true if required, false if optional.
      Default:
      true
